errors.emailAndPassword: Please enter your email and password.
errors.codeRequired: Please enter the code from your email.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Get started

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.

signUp.termsPrefix: By creating an account you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a password reset link to your inbox.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: Check your email and tap the reset link. You'll be redirected back here to set a new password.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.waitingSubtitle: Please tap the password reset link in your email{{emailSuffix}}. You'll be redirected back here automatically.
resetPassword.newPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.doneSubtitle: Your password has been changed. You're now signed in.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteAccountSubtitle: Permanently remove your account and data
profile.resetSubtitle: Clear local data and start fresh
profile.enhanceReplies_inactive: Personalise AI replies to your style
profile.analyticsSubtitle: Usage data to improve the app
profile.doNotSellSubtitle: Opt out of personal data sharing
profile.exportDataSubtitle: Download all your data as JSON
profile.guestHeroBody: Add an email so your data stays safe across devices.

toasts.enablePushInSettings: Open Settings > Notifications to enable push notifications

account.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
account.title: Account
account.backUpFirstBody: Password changes and sign-out need an email on your account. Add one to manage credentials and protect your data.

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current.
errors.changeFailed: Failed to change password. Check your current password.

signOutConfirm.title: Sign out
signOutConfirm.body: Are you sure you want to sign out?

errors.crashBody: We hit an unexpected error. You can try again or restart the app.

consent.privacySubtitle: We use analytics, crash reporting, and AI processing to deliver the best experience. You choose what to allow.
consent.customizeSubtitle: Choose which optional services you'd like to enable. You can change these anytime in Settings.
consent.essentialNote: Essential services (authentication, core app features) are always active and don't require consent.
consent.legalNote: Your preferences are stored locally. You can change them anytime in Profile.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Helps us understand how the app is used so we can improve features.

crashReport.title: Crash Reporting
crashReport.description: Sends anonymous error reports when something goes wrong, so we can fix bugs faster.

aiProcessing.title: AI Data Processing
aiProcessing.description: Allows the app to process your context with our AI to generate replies. Required for AI features.

aiConsent.title: Enable AI Processing
aiConsent.bodyPrefix: To generate replies, the app sends your input to
aiConsent.bodySuffix: . Your data is used only to create suggestions, never to train AI models, and isn't stored beyond your session. You can turn this off any time in Profile.

paywall.productDesc: AI-powered suggestions to help you win every conversation.

alerts.notReadyBody: Subscription packages are still loading. Please try again.
alerts.purchaseFailedAppStore: There was a problem with the App Store. If you are testing, make sure a sandbox tester is signed in via Settings.
alerts.purchaseFailedGeneric: Please try again in a moment.
alerts.noSubscriptionBody: We couldn't find an active subscription for this account.

cancelled.heading: Wait — One Last Offer
cancelled.purchaseFailedBody: Please try again or contact support.

ageGate.title: Boundaries first.
ageGate.body: re:sense is for adults only. Your intent is seen before your identity.
ageGate.privacyNote: We never show your real name by default. You share a sentence and an intent — not a profile. Location is approximate; identity stays yours.
ageGate.underageMessage: You must be 18 or older to use re:sense.

onboarding.title: Set your alias
onboarding.subtitle: This is how you'll appear. Your real name isn't needed.
onboarding.aliasTaken: That alias is taken — try another.
onboarding.boundaryHelper: Pick at least one. You can change these later.
